data.description: Netflix plans to keep increasing its investment in Korea, according to its VP.
A vice president at Netflix indicates plans to explore more live events in South Korea, citing further growth opportunities.

data.title: From Volcanoes to No-Man's Land, Infinix NOTE 60 SERIES Is Built for Every Extreme
data.description: The Infinix NOTE 60 SERIES has solidified its position as a must-have tool for capturing life's adventures and staying connected on a global scale. It serves as vital equipment for users, ensuring no moment goes uncaptured as they traverse Earth’s diverse landscapes. In an event held in Hong Kong on March 19, 2026, the innovative capabilities of the Infinix NOTE 60 SERIES were showcased. This smartphone is designed to keep users seamlessly connected to the world around them, highlighting its importance in today's society. Its features cater to the modern need for staying in touch and documenting experiences, making it a versatile companion for individuals on the go. With cutting-edge technology and sleek design, the Infinix NOTE 60 SERIES sets a new standard for smartphone usage, emphasizing the significance of staying connected and capturing memories in the digital age.

data.title: INDRA AND SYNAPTIC AVIATION ENHANCE EFFICIENCY WITH ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE AT AIRPORTS IN BARCELONA, MADRID AND PALMA DE MALLORCA
data.description: Cutting-edge technology is revolutionizing ground operations at three major Spanish airports operated by Aena, which collectively handle a significant number of passengers. This innovative software is enhancing efficiency and sustainability by streamlining processes like passenger boarding and aircraft rotation. Through improved predictability, the technology is bolstering overall operational performance at these key airports.

For Winners," aims to transform the gaming landscape. Built to bridge existing gaps, the brand is set to make a significant impact.

data.title: Bitcoin lags behind as global money supply grows due to rising energy expenses and tighter financial conditions.
data.description: The increase in fuel prices and strict financial conditions are consuming consumer liquidity, which is one of the reasons why the growth in the global money supply has not led to an increase in Bitcoin value.
